key.name: reorder-left
key.summary: Move focused window left in the row

key.name: reorder-right
key.summary: Move focused window right in the row

key.name: focus-left
key.summary: Focus the window left in the row

key.name: focus-right
key.summary: Focus the window right in the row

key.name: cycle-width
key.summary: Cycle the focused window's width between 33%, 50%, and 67% of the monitor

key.name: excluded-app-ids
key.summary: GTK application IDs to never tile
key.description: Windows whose GTK application ID matches one of these are treated as system chrome (like a panel or dock) and left out of the row entirely, regardless of window type.

key.name: excluded-title-keywords
key.summary: Window title substrings to never tile
key.description: Windows whose title contains one of these substrings (case-insensitive) are treated as system chrome and left out of the row entirely.

key.name: min-tileable-size
key.summary: Minimum window width/height (px) to be tiled
key.description: Windows narrower or shorter than this, in pixels, are left alone instead of tiled — catches small popups/confirmation dialogs that shouldn't be forced into the row.
